title: [SAZ]SurvivorsAndZombies
body:
# **简体中文** 横尸遍野，生灵涂炭！人类已无任何希望！
你现在能做的只有保命！
跑！逃逸才是对的！
注：国内玩家请到[MC百科](https://www.mcmod.cn/modpack/970.html)里进行讨论
# **丧尸启示录！**
包含的模组 只允许僵尸生成
更好的生物群系过度(优化)
铷
FPS减速器
[TaC]永恒枪械工坊
村民崛起-警卫村民
更多的模组
# **English** Bodies lie all over the ground, beings are suffering immensely! Humanity has no hope left!
What you can do now is only to stay alive!
Run! Escaping is the right thing to do!
# **Zombie Apocalypse!**
Included Mods There are no other monsters—Bad Mobs
optimize—Better Biome Blend
Rubidium
FPS Reducer
TaC Guns
Guard Villagers
More Mods ...
[Wiki](https://saz.fandom.com/wiki/SurvivorsAndZombies_Wiki)
[Let's take part in the survey ^ U ^.](https://saz.fandom.com/f/p/4400000000000036388)
[Discord](https://discord.gg/XsdJc4BuYp)
